conversation.text: hey Mike, noticed you're in automotive. been speaking to quite a few dealerships lately. are you guys mainly new or used?

nice, prestige is all about the speed-to-lead. someone's scrolling AutoTrader at 11pm and sees a car they like, they want an answer now|||how are you handling those late night enquiries at the moment?
Usually just wait until the morning. Probably losing some though.

definitely, in prestige whoever replies first usually gets the viewing. our agent handles everything 24/7 so you're first Every time|||Louis does a quick 20 min call to show you how it works for dealerships. want the link?
